testcase.name: loginPageTitleTest
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for title to contain "Account Loginq". Current title: "Account Login" (tried for 5 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.28.0', revision: 'ac342546e9' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.80, chrome: networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:56790/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.80, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: f3483c7c208b62ddc55f07bd4228c5f4 at
